violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the floor at the walk-in cooler, preparation tables, freezer, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

The floor in the kitchen and basement area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
